title: Inspect heavy commercial vehicle fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect heavy commercial vehicle fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect fuel system and components

pcs.text: Task instruction is interpreted and vehicle to be worked on is identified1.2 Inspection information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Potential hazards and risks associated with task are identified and reported to workplace supervisor1.4 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability

elements.title: Inspect fuel system and components

pcs.text: Fuel system and components are inspected according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Inspection results are compared with manufacturer specifications2.3 Inspection findings are reported according to workplace procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes
